song_name: Miley Cyrus - Party In The Usa - Smash Mouth - All Star
version_description: Ive seen this mashup on youtube from several mashup channels, here they are / https://youtu.be/5AhQt1TlKr4 / https://youtu.be/j6Ma0wHRLbc / so i decided to make a Chord Version of this on UG.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  x2


[Verse]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
I hopped off the plane at L.A.X.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                           [ch]G[/ch]
With a dream and my cardigan[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                           [ch]Em[/ch]
Welcome to the land of fame excess,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
Am I gonna fit in?[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Jumped in the cab,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]
Here I am for the first time[/tab]
[tab]                                         [ch]G[/ch]
Look to my right and I see the Hollywood sign[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
This is all so crazy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
Everybody seems so famous[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]Am[/ch]
My tummy's turnin' and I'm feelin' kinda home sick[/tab]
[tab]                                  [ch]G[/ch]
Too much pressure and I'm nervous,[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                  [ch]Em[/ch]
That's when the taxi man turned on the radio[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
And a Jay-Z song was on[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
And the Jay-Z song was on[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
And the Jay-Z song was on[/tab]

====================

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]F#m[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]
Hey now you're an All Star get your game on, go play[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]F#m[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]
Hey now you're a Rock Star get the show on get paid[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]F#m[/ch]
And all that glitters is gold[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]A#[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]
Only shooting stars break the mold[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
It's a cool place and they say it gets colder[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dm[/ch]                       [ch]F[/ch]
You're bundled up now but wait 'til you get older[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
But the meteor men beg to differ[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Dm[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]
Judging by the hole in the satellite picture[/tab]

[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
The ice we skate is getting pretty thin[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Dm[/ch]                        [ch]F[/ch]
The waters getting warm so you might as well swim[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
My world's on fire how about yours[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Dm[/ch]                      [ch]F[/ch]
That's the way I like it and I never get bored[/tab]

============================

[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]

[tab]                      [ch]G[/ch]
I know I'm gonna be OK[/tab]

Yeah, it's a party in the USA[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]

Feel like hoppin' on a flight (on a flight)[/tab]

Back to my hometown tonight (town tonight)[/tab]
